message:
The other evening, my kids and I had a little fire safety drill that turned into an unexpected adventure! We made it a game to practice our escape plan. We pretended we were spies navigating a secret mission, and I couldn't stop chuckling at their antics as they crawled under tables and whispered to each other. It was a lovely reminder that safety doesn’t have to be all serious business—it can be low-tech fun, too! 

This little refresher helped us remember the importance of smoke alarms and kitchen safety while creating some silly memories along the way. Have you ever turned a safety lesson into a fun family activity?
